blockingIssues.description: pattern_learning.rs line 1087: MemoryEntry.repository set to String::new() instead of self.repository.clone(), causing repository-scoped queries to fail finding convention blocks
decay.rs line 56: calculate_decay() returns decay factor > 1.0 when now < last_reinforcement (negative elapsed time), violating documented [0.0, 1.0] range
MemoryEntry lacks confidence, deprecation_info, and superseded_by fields. The deprecation module cannot integrate with the memory system as specified
pattern_learning.rs line 1085: Same repository bug as memory-pattern-learning - convention blocks stored with empty repository string, causing get_conventions() to fail
triple_stream.rs line 520: BM25 search generates random Uuid::new_v4() instead of actual memory entry IDs, breaking RRF fusion across streams
cross_encoder_rerank.rs line 349: RerankableCandidates trait creates MemoryEntry with empty fields but is never called. Also line 492: Same BM25 UUID bug as triple-stream

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the pattern: Never hardcode magic numbers, always load from .swell/settings.json - but currently no crates implement this pattern. Either implement settings loading or clarify the guideline applies only when settings.json exists.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: memory-pattern-learning hardcodes PromotionThresholds values that match settings.json. This is systemic - no crates currently load settings.json

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on async test patterns: #[tokio::test] for async tests should be documented as the standard approach
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mem-cross-encoder-rerank review identified tokio::test pattern not documented in AGENTS.md

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document async_trait::async_trait usage which is critical for this codebase. All async trait methods in swell-memory use this pattern but it's not in the skill file
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Workers spent time discovering async_trait pattern; cross_encoder_rerank.rs uses #[async_trait] pub trait CrossEncoderReranker

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that operator feedback files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md) are parsed for pattern extraction with higher trust weight
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mem-operator-feedback review found this is implicit knowledge not documented in AGENTS.md

rejectedObservations.observation: Feature mem-scoping: 'repository scope required for all memory operations' conflicts with implementation where store/update/delete don't validate repository
rejectedObservations.reason: This is an intentional design choice per reviewer analysis - UUID is unique identifier so filtering is not needed for single-item operations

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md says 'Never hardcode magic numbers - always load from .swell/settings.json', but no crates currently load settings.json. The pattern_learning module hardcodes PromotionThresholds that match settings.json values.
Worker spent time fixing phrase scoring underflow - scoring algorithm edge case handling needs documentation or graceful handling
Handoff claims 4 provenance-specific tests but cargo test shows 0 tests matched

commonBugAcrossFeatures.description: memory-pattern-learning and mem-scoping share the same bug: pattern_learning.rs creates MemoryEntry with repository: String::new() instead of self.repository.clone()
